title: Horse Armor
description: This mod adds craftable horse armor
body:
# New recipes!!

Dependencies:
for fabric and quilt versions the [fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is mandatory

What does this mod present in your game?

This mod adds craftable horse armor

## NEW CRAFT 1.21.11
![Netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef0f94f17e5507c11969e4571f3cb88eb6c0f9f3.png)

## NEW CRAFT 1.21.10
![copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bd1dced7867eba47065b3ad22b022bf2602358e.png)

## CRAFT ALL VERSION:
![diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ddgeENGi/images/b4308a1a2a6856b4f6f517ba2af9d926b5591fc0.png)
![gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ddgeENGi/images/7e9d94a6a6c486d2bb93555fb533ca799e3fbec0.png)
![iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ddgeENGi/images/537cda3af058c2a870622749054655340f1fc28c.png)
![saddle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ddgeENGi/images/4d403e2a18806e72050c4e020c26ee3f1941dd12.png)
</details>



if you want more crafts I have this mod, download it [Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/impossible-crafts-now-possible)

If you find any bugs, feel free to let me know and I will fix them as soon as possible.

feel free to put this mod in modpacks
